text.title: Threads Growth Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the operator have ≥1k followers on IG OR X to cross-promote from?

branch.question: Can operator sustain 5+ posts/day + 10+ replies/day for 90 days?

branch.conclusion: Run playbook: 5+ posts/day + 10+ replies/day + casual register.
Skip this methodology. Threads needs daily cadence; capacity gates this.
Skip launch; grow IG or X to ≥1k first, then return to seed Threads.

text.example: audience=X-4.2k voice=casual capacity=25min/day → run playbook per r1-five-posts-daily.
